```python
def processOperatingSystemCommand(options: List[Union[int, str]]) -> bool:
    command = int(options[0])
    label = str(options[1])
    try: 
        if command == 0:
            processChangeIconNameAndWindowTitle(label)
            return True
        elif command == 1:
            processChangeIconName(label)
            return True
        elif command == 2:
            processChangeWindowTitle(label)
            return True
        else:
            processUnknownOperatingSystemCommand(command, label)
            return True
    except ValueError:
        pass
    return False
```
